rules.rule_text:
title: AWS Snapshot Backup Exfiltration
id: abae8fec-57bd-4f87-aff6-6e3db989843d
status: test
description: Detects the modification of an EC2 snapshot's permissions to enable access
  from another account
references:
- https://www.justice.gov/file/1080281/download
author: Darin Smith
date: 2021-05-17
modified: 2021-08-19
tags:
- attack.exfiltration
- attack.t1537
logsource:
  product: aws
  service: cloudtrail
detection:
  selection_source:
    eventSource: ec2.amazonaws.com
    eventName: ModifySnapshotAttribute
  condition: selection_source
falsepositives:
- Valid change to a snapshot's permissions
level: medium
